name: Bloomingdale's American Express® Card

verdict.text: Unremarkable outside Bloomingdale's — a flat 2% card beats it elsewhere

earn_rates.category: Bloomingdale's, bloomingdales.com, Bloomingdale's The Outlet Store & everywhere Amex is accepted — Loyallist tier (default)
Same categories, at Top of the List / Top of the List Unlocked status tiers

earn_note: This is the open-loop American Express version of Bloomingdale's card — it earns outside Bloomingdale's, unlike the closed-loop, store-only Bloomingdale's Credit Card, which can earn up to 10 pts/$1 at Bloomingdale's at the top status tier but earns nothing anywhere else. On the Amex version, the rate is flat regardless of where you spend — 3 pts/$1 at Loyallist status, rising to 4 pts/$1 once you reach Top of the List status (exact annual-spend thresholds for tier advancement weren't published on Citi's or Bloomingdale's public pages at the time of writing).

redemption_options.method: Reward redeemable the day after earning, applied at Bloomingdale's or bloomingdales.com

points.per_100k: $500 in Bloomingdale's rewards (5,000 points = $25, so 100,000 points ≈ $500)
points.note: Despite the open-loop Amex network letting you earn everywhere, redemption is closed-loop — rewards come back as Bloomingdale's-only credit, not cash or a statement credit. At 3 pts/$1 and 5,000 pts = $25, the effective cash-back rate is about 1.5%, rising to roughly 2% at 4 pts/$1.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners — Loyallist points redeem only at Bloomingdale's or bloomingdales.com.

insurance.detail: Not confirmed on Citi's or Bloomingdale's public product pages for this card
Not confirmed on Citi's or Bloomingdale's public product pages for this card

protection_note: Despite running on the American Express network, this is a Citi-issued retail co-brand, not a standard Amex-issued card — the usual Amex purchase-protection/extended-warranty suite is not confirmed to apply. Treat this as a rewards-and-financing card with no meaningful insurance suite.
rental_note: No rental car coverage found for this card.

status_perks.name: Loyallist status tiers
status_perks.note: Loyallist (default) → Top of the List → Top of the List Unlocked, based on annual spend. Higher tiers earn more points per dollar and get earlier access to sales/events; exact spend thresholds weren't published on Citi's public page.

services.name: International transaction fee
services.detail: 3% on purchases and cash advances made in a foreign currency, per Bloomingdale's cardholder terms.

services.name: Special financing offers
services.detail: Deferred-interest/promotional financing periodically offered on qualifying Bloomingdale's purchases — check current terms before financing.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns rewards on their spend (into your account)
No dedicated insurance to share — this card doesn't carry a confirmed protection suite

additional_cards.note: Free to add, useful mainly for pooling a household's spend toward reaching a higher Loyallist tier faster.

timeline.text: Bloomingdale's/Citi issue two distinct card products: the closed-loop, store-only Bloomingdale's Credit Card (up to 10 pts/$1 at Bloomingdale's at top status, unusable elsewhere) and this open-loop Bloomingdale's American Express Card (3–4 pts/$1 flat, anywhere Amex is accepted). Confirm which one you're comparing — they are not the same card.
